_acl.description: Calculated security rules organized for easy lookup

_main.description: Concept-level access per role. Values: 'read' = SELECT only; 'write' = full INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE for all rows; 'owner_write' = INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE only on rows owned by the authenticated user.

_fields.description: Effective field access per role after rule inheritance and removals are resolved. Field access normally restricts _main, but 'write' under concept-level 'read' grants UPDATE without INSERT or DELETE. An absent role has no access to that field.
